purpose: Fragrance bottle on reflective gold pedestal with soft smoke wisps curling around. Mystical, premium.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Cinematic product photography of {product_descriptor} on reflective polished gold cylindrical pedestal, soft white smoke wisps rising and curling around product against pitch black studio background, warm amber rim lighting from behind catching smoke creating golden particle effects, gold pedestal mirrors product base, subtle volumetric god rays through smoke, hyper-realistic smoke physics, shot on 100mm at f/8, no text, no watermark, no fire {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow, defend. Source code in research corpus: T07. Saudi adaptation guidance: Deeply resonant with Saudi luxury market for oud and bukhoor-adjacent products. Critical: smoke must read as incense vapor not cigarette. Negative explicitly counters this. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1 per month.
